data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data transmitted between users and the site is encrypted to prevent interception.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.3 encryption is implemented for secure data transfer.

data.title: Continuous Monitoring
data.description: Real-time monitoring systems track and report suspicious activities and potential breaches.
data.technical_spec: Network intrusion detection systems are utilized.

data.title: Content Security Policy
data.description: Prevents cross-site scripting (XSS) by specifying which content sources are trusted.
data.technical_spec: Strict CSP headers are set to minimize potential XSS vulnerabilities.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigation strategies in place to prevent Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of global CDNs and automatic traffic filtering.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Strong multi-factor authentication mechanisms protect user accounts from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Support for biometric logins and security keys alongside traditional passwords.
